message:
Add file persistence for tag mappings with atomic writes

Tag mapping store persistence (tag-mapping-store.ts):
- Add file-based persistence via JFP_TAG_MAPPINGS_PATH env var
- Implement atomic writes using temp file + rename pattern
- Hydrate store on first access from persisted JSON
- Persist on every mutation (upsert/remove)
- Coerce and validate mappings during load
- Track persistedPath and lastPersistError for observability
- Normalize order to handle missing/duplicate entries

API updates (route.ts):
- Export getTagMappingsMeta() for persistence status
- Return persistedPath and lastPersistError in response meta

Admin UI simplification (page.tsx):
- Remove updatedBy field from form (auto-assigned to "admin")
- Display persistence metadata in response
- Simplify form layout

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
